citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
A bottle of expired Pyrantel (Exp 10/12/2024) was in storage and had been used in regulated animals within the past year.
A representative thinks this bottle was purchased new/un-opened within the past year, however the expiration date had
not been noticed. The use of expired medications may not be effective or in some cases can make animals sick. Ensure
that expired medications are not used in regulated animals.
***Correct from 5/29/2026 forward.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.40(b)(2) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
A bottle of expired Pyrantel (Exp 10/12/2024) was in storage and had been used in regulated animals within the past year. 
A representative thinks this bottle was purchased new/un-opened within the past year, however the expiration date had 
not been noticed. The use of expired medications may not be effective or in some cases can make animals sick. Ensure 
that expired medications are not used in regulated animals.  
***Correct from 5/29/2026 forward. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives. 
 
 n
